task: Write a Python function that extracts the AWS account ID from an ARN string. The ARN format is 'arn:aws:service:region:account-id:resource'.
Create a JSON object representing an AWS S3 bucket policy that allows public read access to all objects in the bucket named 'my-public-bucket'.
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS EC2 security group IDs. Security group IDs follow the format 'sg-' followed by 8 or 17 hexadecimal characters.
